productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Elroy Black Sports Shoes
description: This rugged pair of Elroy shoes from adidas makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It's a great combination of enhanced cushioning and heavy duty durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish on tough trekking terrain. You can team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.UpperSynthetic leather upper with emboss detailing combined with mesh panels give lightweight feel, superior breathability and structure Suede toe counter for added durabilityLace-ups for snug FitIconic three stripes on the sides symbolising elegance and durability, and adding structure to the shoePadded collar and tongue for extra comfortEmbroidered logo on the heel counterAppliqued logo on the tongueMidsoleShock-absorbing lightweight Phylon midsole for enhanced comfortOutsoleHigh abrasion resistant rubber on outsole for durabilityRugged tread design with lugs for superior tractionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
